purpose: Phase 15 Feed / Crawl Discovery Engine for Matrix Reprogrammed. This data defines public feeds for readers, crawlers, AI search systems, and update discovery.
rules: Feeds should help discovery without pretending static pages are live news.
Every feed item must point back to a human-readable route.
Machine feeds should preserve trust, evidence, and claim-boundary routes.
RSS, Atom, and JSON Feed outputs should be generated together.
Feed pages must route users back to the Download Center, Schema Index, Trust Center, and Update Monitor.
Feeds must not expose private or non-public user data.

feeds.title: Matrix Reprogrammed Main Signal Feed
feeds.summary: Primary discovery feed for new Matrix Reprogrammed hubs, dossier packs, schema outputs, and reader routes.

feeds.title: Evidence And Trust Feed
feeds.summary: Discovery feed for trust policy, evidence lanes, source methodology, claim labels, and corrections routes.

feeds.title: Intelligence And Crime Feed
feeds.summary: Discovery feed for intelligence dossiers, crime-state overlap, network maps, public-record books, and source routes.

feeds.title: Downloads And Schema Feed
feeds.summary: Discovery feed for dossier packs, machine-readable schema files, site graph, claim taxonomy, and crawler map outputs.
